zh.lifeSummary: 當William Bertram Baron of Mitford於1157年出生在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德米特福德時，他的父親Roger Bertram29歲，母親Ada de Morville27歲。他和Alice de Umfreville至少有3個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1205年在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德莫普斯享年48歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Bertram Baron of Mitford于1157年出生在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德米特福德时，他的父亲Roger Bertram29岁，母亲Ada de Morville27岁。他和Alice de Umfreville至少有3个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1205年在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德莫普斯享年48岁。

nameMeanings.name: Mitford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Medford
meanings: English: variant of Mitford, a habitational name from Mitford (Northumberland). The placename probably derives from Old English midd ‘middle’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: Bertram
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from berht ‘bright, famous’ + hramn ‘raven’. Ravens were traditional symbols of wisdom in Germanic mythology; Odin was regularly accompanied by ravens called Hugin and Munin. This name was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. See also Bertrand .

nameMeanings.name: Baron
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the title of nobility, along the lines of Earl and Duke . The title arose in the Norman feudal system and seems to be of Germanic origin, derived from Old English beorn ‘young warrior’ or a related continental Germanic form. In part the given name, and in particular the variant Barron , may represent the surname derived from the title.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

en.lifeSummary: When William Bertram Baron of Mitford was born in 1157, in Mitford, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, his father, Roger Bertram, was 29 and his mother, Ada de Morville, was 27. He had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with Alice de Umfreville. He died in 1205, in Morpeth, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Bertram Baron of Mitford est né en 1157, à Mitford, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Roger Bertram, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Ada de Morville, avait 27 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille avec Alice de Umfreville. Il est décédé en 1205, à Morpeth, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 48 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Bertram Baron of Mitford 1157 in Mitford, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger Bertram 29 und seine Mutter Ada de Morville 27. Er hatte mit Alice de Umfreville mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1205 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Morpeth, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Bertram Baron of Mitford è nato il nel 1157 nel Mitford, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Roger Bertram, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Ada de Morville, aveva 27 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia con Alice de Umfreville. Morì nel 1205, nel Morpeth, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 48 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William Bertram Baron of Mitfordが1157年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドミトフォードで生まれた時，父Roger Bertramは29歳，母Ada de Morvilleは27歳であった。彼はAlice de Umfrevilleとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1205年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドモーペスで48歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Bertram Baron of Mitford(이)가 1157년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 미트퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger Bertram(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Ada de Morville(은)는 27세였다. 그는 Alice de Umfreville(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1205년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 모르페스에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Bertram Baron of Mitford nasceu em 1157, em Mitford, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Roger Bertram, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Ada de Morville, tinha 27 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha com Alice de Umfreville. Ele faleceu em 1205, em Morpeth, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 48 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Bertram Baron of Mitford родился в 1157 г. в местности митфорд, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Roger Bertram было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Ada de Morville, 27. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь от Alice de Umfreville. Он умер в 1205 г. в местности морпет, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 48 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Bertram Baron of Mitford nació en 1157, en Mitford, Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Roger Bertram, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Ada de Morville, tenía 27 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija con Alice de Umfreville. Murió en 1205, en Morpeth, Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 48 años.
